---
title: "AVl Textur: annotations"
bibliography: textur.bib
#nocite: '@pethes_war_2006'
# tables:
#   - tbl_qa: {file: "qa.qmd", num: 1}
#   - tbl-summary: {file: "results.qmd", num: 2}
title-meta: ""
# date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: "2026-05-14"
---


## notes on papers
### snc
123

<!-- @nietzsche_kga_2024   
@nietzsche_friedrich_1902   
@gunther_rhythmus_2008 -->
{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| eval: true
#| results: "asis"
#| output: false

#load("margindb.RData")
#qa1<-list(nietzsche=c("nietzsche, kga 3-1, geburt d tragödie.pdf","nietzsche briefe ggl.pdf","Günther 2008, Der Wettkampf.pdf","Nietzsche, Homers Wettkampf, KGW III.2.pdf"))
qa1<-list(textur=qa$textur)
#qa1
# qa2<-list(nietzsche=c("nietzsche, kga 3-1, geburt d tragödie.pdf","nietzsche briefe ggl.pdf","Günther 2008, Der Wettkampf.pdf","Nietzsche, Homers Wettkampf, KGW III.2"))
```

{{< include _vars.qmd >}}
